name: UCloud Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: UCloud Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops cloud computing technology platform solutions. The company offers cloud computing products, such as IaaS, PaaS, big data circulation platform, and AI service platform solutions. It also provides products in the areas of data analysis, artificial intelligence, and the Internet of things; security, safety compliance, enterprise application, and management and monitoring; and hybrid and private cloud solutions. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Shanghai, China.
